description: AdGuard Home is a network-wide software for blocking ads and tracking. After you set it up, it'll cover all your home devices, and you won't need any client-side software for that. Learn more on our official Github repository.
tagline: Network-wide ads & trackers blocking DNS server.
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
Run this script:

```
bash -c "$(wget -qLO - https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bigbeartechworld/big-bear-scripts/master/generate-adguard-home-config/run.sh)"
```

After running this script, you need to restart the container.

title: AdGuard Home
